title: Brandifert
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Brandifert''' was a type of fruit grown on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]. Brandiferts could be made into sweet tarts with [[podon]]s.

{{Flora-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
